data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the auto-maintenance trigger.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the auto-maintenance trigger after 40 hours of use, as specified in the linked use case. However, the prior step evidence does not provide any information or data regarding the implementation or state of this trigger. Without concrete evidence confirming the existence or functionality of the auto-maintenance trigger, the requirement cannot be validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of the auto-maintenance trigger functionality after 40 hours of use.
